---
title: "Oliver Brose"
toc: false
listing:
  - id: recent
    contents:
      - _content/**/*.qmd
      - _content/**/*.md
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description]
    sort: "date desc"
    max-items: 6
    feed: false
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

::: {.hero-banner}

# Oliver Brose

Data science and marketing measurement.

I write about Bayesian / frequentist statistics, causal inference, A/B testing, MMM, geo-testing, and synthetic control — mostly from a practitioner's perspective.

:::

## Recent

:::{#recent}
:::

[Browse all blog posts →](blog.qmd) &nbsp;·&nbsp; [Papers →](papers.qmd) &nbsp;·&nbsp; [CV →](cv.qmd)
